title: Generated baseline virtual structure
objective: Create the automatic baseline virtual structure after primary source analysis, with confidence, evidence and conflicts.
non_goals: Do not use cloud LLM/OCR for baseline in MVP.
Do not publish baseline as accepted organization structure without review.
requirements: Baseline generation must run in dry-run mode.
Each placement must include virtual_path, confidence, evidence, conflicts and review_required.
Low confidence, ACL conflict, sensitivity conflict and duplicate ambiguity must create review visibility.
Baseline must not change physical files or source metadata except explicit organization planning records.
acceptance_checks: Synthetic corpus produces a baseline virtual view with explainable placements.
Low-confidence files are routed to review.
Files with conflicting ACL/sensitivity are not grouped into unsafe folders.
Baseline command prints safe metrics and does not leak raw content.
